data.title: Kalshi's ban appeal rejected in Nevada, facing restraining order from state court, halting sports contracts. - US lawyer Wallach
data.description: According to legal expert Daniel Wallach, a Nevada state court is expected to issue a restraining order against Kalshi, a gaming company, which will prohibit it from providing sports-related contracts in the United States.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- TIER IV, Inc./
data.description: TIER IV has introduced AI-powered Level 4 autonomous driving technology, expediting its worldwide growth in Japan, the U.S., and Europe. The announcement was made on March 15, 2026, by TIER IV, Inc. via PR Newswire. It was further updated on March 18, indicating that two additional scenes have been added to the video.
According to JPMorgan Chase & Co., there is a bias to wait for June forecasts, though reaffirming the March outlook in April may justify a hike.
According to JPMorgan Chase & Co., the second hike is likely after June forecasts, with validation paving the way for a July increase.
JPMorgan Chase & Co. forecasts two interest rate cuts, but only in the second and fourth quarters of 2027.
JPMorgan Chase & Co. now expects the Bank of England to raise interest rates by 25 bps in April and July 2026, reversing its prior view of no rate changes this year.
JPMorgan Chase & Co. says inflation is likely to ease next year but only beginning in the spring period.

data.title: Industry protests Kentucky bill that could ban self-custody in crypto transactions; calls for removal of hardware wallet clause.
data.description: A Kentucky bill regulating crypto kiosks has sparked controversy by potentially banning self-custody, prompting criticism from the industry. The bill contains provisions that could outlaw self-custody practices within the state. The proposal has led to backlash from industry experts and advocates who argue that this restriction could hinder innovation and limit individuals' control over their own cryptocurrency assets. This development comes amid growing scrutiny of the crypto sector, with proponents raising concerns about the impact of such regulations on the industry's growth. The bill's implications have raised alarm bells, with critics pointing out the potential dangers of restricting self-custody in a rapidly evolving digital asset landscape. The proposed legislation has stirred debate within the crypto community, with key stakeholders voicing their concerns about the potential consequences of this regulatory approach. The fate of the bill remains uncertain, with stakeholders closely monitoring its progress as it moves through the legislative process. It represents a significant turning point in the ongoing discussions surrounding cryptocurrency regulation, with its outcome likely to have far-reaching implications for the industry.

data.description: Kao Corporation organized the "YOUR ONE AND ONLY. Biore Global Brand Event" in Tokyo on Thursday, March 19, 2026.

data.title: Global gold trade group plans platform linking physical gold to tokenized gold products, Council to develop system.
data.description: The World Gold Council has announced its plan to create a platform that will link physical gold to the processes involved in issuing and overseeing tokenized gold products.
Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reports the shutdown of refinery units at Al Ahmadi after a drone strike.
Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reports that an attack on the Al Ahmadi refinery led to fires in several units.
